title: Planet Zero Pack
description: The modpack to be used for the Planet Zero Discord's official Minecraft server!
body:
This pack was created for the Planet Zero Discord's Minecraft server. It will be occasionally updated as needed for the playerbase.

Links to mods that are distributed on other platforms include:
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
